text.title: Weak-Model Preselection Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable signals to a rule from 01-core-rules.xml.

decision-tree.root-question: Is this a high-stakes decision (medical / legal / security / compliance)?

branch.question: Can the cascade operate as a ranker (strong model still sees all candidates)?

conclusion.verdict: deploy rank-then-rerank variant; strong model receives top-K ranked candidates, none filtered out
reject cascade; route to single-pass strong model

branch.question: Is the input noise ratio > 70% AND input length > 5K tokens?

conclusion.verdict: deploy filter-then-reason with escape hatch and 3x cost-savings ratio target
tune weak model / fall back to rank-then-rerank; do not deploy filter cascade with recall < 0.95

text.example: high_stakes=false → q-noise: 88% noise on RSS dedupe → q-recall: 0.97 with Haiku + 3-shot → weak-filter-strong-reasoner; filter-then-reason variant deployed; cost-savings 9.2x.
